NAME: All of Us — EHR data model harmonization (i2b2 → OMOP)
DESCRIPTION: Transformation of i2b2-sourced electronic health record data into the OMOP Common Data Model for the All of Us Research Program, enabling standardized cross-institutional analysis of clinical data.
TITLE: Data model harmonization for the All Of Us Research Program: Transforming i2b2 data into the OMOP common data model
